'''fataga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zale|zale]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zale|zale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fataga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætægæth|fætægæth]] || [[word:fætægæj|fætægæj]] || [[word:fætægæsh|fætægæsh]] || [[word:fætægæ|fætægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatatagath|fatatagath]] || [[word:fatatagaj|fatatagaj]] || [[word:fatatagash|fatatagash]] || [[word:fatataga|fatataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatagath|fatagath]] || [[word:fatagaj|fatagaj]] || [[word:fatagash|fatagash]] || [[word:fataga|fataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fatafgath|fatafgath]] || [[word:fatafgaj|fatafgaj]] || [[word:fatafgash|fatafgash]] || [[word:fatafgaf|fatafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatagatha|fatagatha]] || [[word:fatagaja|fatagaja]] || [[word:fatagasha|fatagasha]] || [[word:fatagaka|fatagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatagath|fatagath]] || [[word:fatagaj|fatagaj]] || [[word:fatagash|fatagash]] || [[word:fataga|fataga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatagathal|fatagathal]] || [[word:fatagajal|fatagajal]] || [[word:fatagashal|fatagashal]] || [[word:fatagakal|fatagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatagathatha|fatagathatha]] || [[word:fatagajaja|fatagajaja]] || [[word:fatagashasha|fatagashasha]] || [[word:fatagaka|fatagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatagathan|fatagathan]] || [[word:fatagajan|fatagajan]] || [[word:fatagashan|fatagashan]] || [[word:fatagakan|fatagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatagathaoro|fatagathaoro]] || [[word:fatagajaoro|fatagajaoro]] || [[word:fatagashaoro|fatagashaoro]] || [[word:fatagakaoro|fatagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
